studies.title:
Use of a training-based smartphone application (Orthopy App) for patients with
rotator cuff-related disorders in comparison to usual care – a randomized,
controlled, multicenter study

Use of a smartphone application (Orthopy App) to improve preoperative and postoperative therapy in patients with ACL rupture compared to conventional standard of care treatment - a randomized, monocentric study.

Use of a smartphone application (Orthopy App) to improve pre- and
postoperative therapy in patients after anterior cruciate ligament rupture
(with or without meniscal damage) or meniscal damage alone compared
to conventional standard of care treatment - a randomized, controlled,
multicenter study

Early Postoperative Application of Radial Extracorporeal Shock Wave Therapy (rESWT) and Neuroreflectory Hyberbaric CO2 Cryotherapie Following Primary Reconstruction of the Anterior Cruciate Ligament: A Prospective, Randomized, Controlled Study
